assignments.name: Assign_All_Deal_Teams_To_Collection
assignments.label: Assign All Deal Teams To Collection

assignments.name: Assign_Selected_Deal_Teams_To_Collection
assignments.label: Assign Selected Deal Teams To Collection

decisions.name: Country_Teams_Account_Teams_or_Deal_Teams
decisions.label: Country Teams, Account Teams or Deal Teams

decisions.name: Is_Deal_Team_Collection_Populated_or_Empty
decisions.label: Is Deal Team Collection Populated or Empty?

formulas.name: f_AccountOwnerOrBlank
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!UpdateRecordOwners.value} = TRUE, CONTAINS({!bb_TeamsToUpdate.value}, 'Account Teams') ), 'Account Owner - ', '' )

formulas.name: f_DealOwnerOrBlank
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!UpdateRecordOwners.value} = TRUE, CONTAINS({!bb_TeamsToUpdate.value}, 'Deal Teams') ), 'Deal Owner - ', '' )

formulas.name: f_SectionOneComplete

recordLookups.description: Get a list of any Country with a lookup to the selected user
recordLookups.name: Get_Countries_With_Replacee
recordLookups.label: Get Countries With Replacee

recordLookups.name: Get_Deal_Teams_For_All_Active_Deals
recordLookups.label: Get Deal Teams For All Active Deals

recordLookups.name: Get_Deal_Teams_For_Selected_Deals
recordLookups.label: Get Deal Teams For Selected Deals
